name: C-10 --section control-coverage --controls-file emits a bundle with control coverage data
command: printf '%s' '{"soc2-tsc:CC7.2":{"detector":"x"}}' > c.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --section control-coverage --emit p.json --controls-file c.json --commit-sha abc --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z && grep -q 'CC7.2\|soc2-tsc' p.json && echo bundled 1>&2
